Container.Name: YAHLP-Private
Container.Description: YAHLP - Private Mode (HTTP + Basic Auth). Simple setup for internal networks with username/password protection. No domain or certificates required.
Container.Overview:
YAHLP - Yet Another HomeLab Portal - Private Mode Template
Configured for private network deployment with: - HTTP access only (port 80) - Basic authentication (username/password) - Internal network access
Perfect for private lab environments without public exposure.

Config.Name: Access Mode
Config.Description: Set to private for internal networks (HTTP only)

Config.Name: Internal IP
Config.Description: Your server IP (e.g., 192.168.1.100)

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone (e.g., Australia/Sydney, UTC, US/Eastern). Leave blank for default.

Config.Name: Dashboard Name
Config.Description: Title displayed in dashboard

Config.Name: Dashboard Style
Config.Description: Choose: classic, modern, sleek, minimal. Append :only to disable style switcher (e.g., classic:only)

Config.Name: Dashboard Color
Config.Description: Accent color (hex code, e.g., #00A99D)

Config.Name: Dashboard Landing Page
Config.Description: Default page to load when accessing dashboard. Examples: radarr, sonarr, sonarr/calendar, radarr/upcoming. Leave blank to show YAHLP welcome screen.

Config.Name: Dashboard Service Order
Config.Description: Service display order (3-letter codes, only enabled services shown).

Config.Name: Authentication Type
Config.Description: Choose: none, basic, google, entra

Config.Name: Basic Auth Credentials
Config.Description: Format: user:pass or user1:pass1|user2:pass2

Config.Name: Enable SABnzbd
Config.Description: SABnzbd - Usenet Client (Config - Special - url_base() to /sabnzbd)

Config.Name: SABnzbd URL
Config.Description: Your local URL

Config.Name: SABnzbd Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom SABnzbd icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: Enable NZBGet
Config.Description: NZBGet - Usenet Client (Set User and Pass below to bypass NZBGet auth

Config.Name: NZBGet URL
Config.Description: Your local URL

Config.Name: NZBGet Username
Config.Description: NZBGet username (if required)

Config.Name: NZBGet Password
Config.Description: NZBGet password (if required)

Config.Name: NZBGet Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom NZBGet icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: Enable NZBHydra
Config.Description: NZBHydra - Usenet Meta Indexer (Config - Main - URLBase to /nzbhydra)

Config.Name: NZBHydra URL
Config.Description: Your local url

Config.Name: NZBHydra Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom NZBHydra icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: Enable Transmission
Config.Description: Transmission - Torrent Client

Config.Name: Transmission URL
Config.Description: Your local url

Config.Name: Transmission Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom Transmission icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: Enable qBittorrent
Config.Description: qBittorrent - Torrent Client

Config.Name: qBittorrent URL
Config.Description: Your local url (Check port for conflict, default to same port as other apps)

Config.Name: qBittorrent Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom Qbittorreny icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: Enable Deluge
Config.Description: Deluge - Torrent Client

Config.Name: Deluge URL
Config.Description: Your local url

Config.Name: Deluge Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom Deluge icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: Enable Sonarr
Config.Description: Sonarr - TV Show Automation (Settings - General - URL Base to /sonarr)

Config.Name: Sonarr URL
Config.Description: Your local url

Config.Name: Sonarr Landing
Config.Description: Landing page (e.g., sonarr, sonarr/calendar)

Config.Name: Sonarr Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom Sonarr icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: Enable Radarr
Config.Description: Radarr - Movie Automation ((Settings - General - URL Base to /radarr)

Config.Name: Radarr URL
Config.Description: Your local url

Config.Name: Radarr Landing
Config.Description: Landing page (e.g., radarr, radarr/calendar)

Config.Name: Radarr Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom Radarr icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: Enable Whisparr
Config.Description: Whisparr - Adult Content Automation (Settings - General - URL Base to /whisparr)

Config.Name: Whisparr URL
Config.Description: Your local url

Config.Name: Whisparr Landing
Config.Description: Landing page

Config.Name: Whisparr Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom Whisparr icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: Enable Lidarr
Config.Description: Lidarr - Music Automation (Settings - General - URL Base to to /lidarr)

Config.Name: Lidarr URL
Config.Description: Your local url

Config.Name: Lidarr Landing
Config.Description: Landing page

Config.Name: Lidarr Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom Lidarr icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: Enable Prowlarr
Config.Description: Prowlarr - Indexer Manager (Settings - General - URL Base to /prowlarr)

Config.Name: Prowlarr URL
Config.Description: Your local url

Config.Name: Prowlarr Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom Prowlarr icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: Enable Jackett
Config.Description: Jackett - Indexer Aggregator (Config - Admin - url_base() to /jackett)

Config.Name: Jackett URL
Config.Description: Your local url

Config.Name: Jackett Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom Jackett icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: Enable Seerr
Config.Description: Seerr - Request Manager (In Public mode, Seer uses a subdomain, make sure you have a DNS record configured)

Config.Name: Seerr URL
Config.Description: Your local url

Config.Name: Seerr Domain
Config.Description: Subdomain for Seerr

Config.Name: Seerr Redirect URI
Config.Description: OAuth redirect URI - configure in Entra or Google

Config.Name: Seerr Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom Seerr icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: Enable Bazarr
Config.Description: Bazarr - Subtitle Manager (Settings - General - Base URL to /bazarr)

Config.Name: Bazarr URL
Config.Description: Your local url

Config.Name: Bazarr Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom Bazarr icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: Enable Jellyfin
Config.Description: Jellyfin - Media Server (Settings -Admin Dash - Networking - Base URL /jellyfin)

Config.Name: Jellyfin URL
Config.Description: Your local url

Config.Name: Jellyfin Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom Jellyfin icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: Enable Emby
Config.Description: Emby - Media Server (In public mode,Emby uses a subdomain, make sure you have a DNS record configured)

Config.Name: Emby URL
Config.Description: Your local url

Config.Name: Emby Domain
Config.Description: Subdomain for Emby

Config.Name: Emby Redirect URI
Config.Description: OAuth redirect URI - configure in Entra or Google

Config.Name: Emby Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom Emby icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: Enable Plex
Config.Description: Plex - Media Server (in public mode, Plex uses a subdomain, make sure you have a DNS record configured)

Config.Name: Plex URL
Config.Description: Your local url

Config.Name: Plex Domain
Config.Description: Subdomain for Plex

Config.Name: Plex Redirect URI
Config.Description: OAuth redirect URI

Config.Name: Plex Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom Plex icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: Enable Tautulli
Config.Description: Tautulli - Plex Analytics (Settings - Show Advanced - Web Interface - Enable Proxy, Set Public Domain to https://yahlp.yourdomain.com/tautulli and HTTP root to /tautulli)

Config.Name: Tautulli URL
Config.Description: Your local url

Config.Name: Tautulli Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom Tautulli icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: Enable Maintainerr
Config.Description: Maintainerr - Media Server Maintenance (Enable BASE_URL environment variable on its docker and set to /maintainerr)

Config.Name: Maintainerr URL
Config.Description: Your local url

Config.Name: Maintainerr Icon
Config.Description: URL to download custom Maintainerr icon (leave blank for builtin)

Config.Name: SSL Certificates
Config.Description: SSL Certificates

Config.Name: Apache Logs
Config.Description: Apache Logs
